# DakJen Creative LLC

> A multidisciplinary brand strategy and creative studio based in New York City and Baltimore. Founded by Dakotah Jennifer (CEO). We offer strategy, storytelling, and execution — all under one roof.

## Company Overview

DakJen Creative LLC is a brand strategy and creative studio serving founders, executives, and mission-driven organizations. We specialize in building brands that are sharp, credible, and built to move — from positioning and identity through campaign execution and content.

- **Founder:** Dakotah Jennifer, CEO
- **Locations:** New York, NY · Baltimore, MD
- **Service Areas (Lease-Up Marketing):** Washington D.C., Baltimore, Maryland, Virginia, DMV metro, and nationally
- **Contact:** hello@dakjencreative.com
- **Website:** https://dakjencreative.com

## Services

### Fractional Brand Management & Creative Consulting
Our flagship service. A dedicated brand department for founders and executives — without the full-time hire. Core focus: social media management, content strategy, brand positioning, campaign oversight, collateral production, and quarterly brand audits. Entry point: Brand Audit.
- Clients include: Northern Real Estate Urban Ventures (NREUV), Project Community Capital (PCC)
- Page: https://dakjencreative.com/fractional.html

### Notable — Brand Platform for Women Founders
A tiered brand strategy platform built specifically for women founders. Offers visibility, positioning, and growth support at every stage. Includes access to the Vanguard Band community.
- Page: https://dakjencreative.com/notable.html

### Lease-Up Marketing (DJC Marketing)
Full-cycle lease-up marketing for affordable housing developments — from pre-leasing through stabilization. Serving developers across Washington D.C., Baltimore, Maryland, Virginia, the greater DMV, and nationally. DJC Marketing understands how affordable housing is financed, how income-qualification works, and what it takes to reach applicants by design, not by volume.

Services include:
- Pre-leasing strategy and campaign planning
- Apartment listings (Apartments.com, Zillow, AffordableHousing.com, Craigslist)
- Paid social ads (Facebook, Instagram) and Google Display campaigns
- Organic social media content
- Traditional media: billboards, radio spots, newspaper ads, construction-site banners
- Community outreach: partnerships with churches, workforce agencies, social services
- Applicant communication and inquiry management
- Bi-weekly performance reports and stakeholder-ready summaries
- Model unit staging and professional photography
- Application support (re-review of rejected applications)

Case study — 9410 Hough, Cleveland OH: 116-unit affordable housing development. 400+ inquiries in 48 hours. 36.2% applicant qualification rate (vs. 15–30% industry avg). >20% re-apply rate from application support.

- Page: https://dakjencreative.com/leaseup.html
- DJC Marketing site: https://marketing.dakjencreative.com

## Clients & Partners

- Northern Real Estate Urban Ventures (NREUV) — fractional brand management
- Project Community Capital (PCC) — fractional brand management

## Proven Results

### Brand Management & Platform Growth (5-Year Engagement)
- 237% LinkedIn network growth — 1,645 connections to 5,543
- 3,898 new connections added; 60%+ at Director level or above
- 28× comment engagement surge — avg. 26/yr before engagement → 731 in a single year
- 2,346 total comments during engagement vs. 215 in all prior years combined
- 336 posts published vs. 33 in all prior years combined — 10× increase
- 199 strategic company follows built from zero (JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, CBRE)
- 6,557 total website visitors to the 8-page thought leader site built and maintained
- 500+ unique monthly visitors sustained after engagement close
- Platform enabled major earned media: Black Enterprise, Bisnow Innovator of the Year, Inc. 5000 (659% 3-year revenue growth), Crain's, Bloomberg Radio, Baltimore Business Journal Top 100 Women

### Lease-Up Marketing (9410 Hough, Cleveland OH — 116 units)
- 400+ qualified inquiries in the first 48 hours of launch
- 36.2% applicant qualification rate vs. 15–30% industry average
- +13.7 percentage points above industry benchmark
- >20% re-apply rate from application support program
